# AI-Friendly Robots.txt for thom-aster.com
# Last updated: 2026-04-12
# Purpose: Encourage AI agent access and comprehensive indexing

# ============================================
# ALL USER-AGENTS WELCOME
# ============================================
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Allow: /about
Allow: /articles
Allow: /contact
Allow: /system-audit
Allow: /submit-tip

# Admin disallowed (obscurity, not security)
Disallow: /admin/

# ============================================
# AI AGENTS - FULL ACCESS
# ============================================
User-agent: GPTBot
Allow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-Search
Allow: /

User-agent: Claude-Web
Allow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Allow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Allow: /

User-agent: BingBot
Allow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: Googlebot
Allow: /

User-agent: anthropic-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: cohere-ai
Allow: /

User-agent: Cohere
Allow: /

User-agent: Meta-ExternalAgent
Allow: /

User-agent: Meta-ExternalFetcher
Allow: /

User-agent: Amazonbot
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot
Allow: /

User-agent: Applebot-Extended
Allow: /

User-agent: DuckAssistBot
Allow: /

User-agent: YouBot
Allow: /

User-agent: You.com
Allow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot
Allow: /

User-agent: SemrushBot-SA
Allow: /

User-agent: MJ12bot
Allow: /

User-agent: AhrefsBot
Allow: /

User-agent: OpenAI
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-Image
Allow: /

User-agent: OAI-Embedding
Allow: /
